immutable_record_notice: Once frozen, this study manifest is immutable. Changes require a new record version linked to the superseded raw-byte digest.

amendment.rationale: Method supersession for truthful solo research with AI tooling. Abandons two-primary-plus-tie human staffing as unexecutable in this research context. Adopts single human research-lead adjudication with non-adjudicative AI tooling, EXPLORATORY analysis modes, and dual-role author/freeze/adjudicator disclosure. Does not invent human adjudicators and does not authorize AI as final coder.

subject.name: Candidate Memory Taxonomy v0.1
subject.definition: A product-independent candidate memory taxonomy comprising versioned terms, orthogonal classification axes, competing kind-first and role-first organizations, observable distinctions, boundary cases, lifecycle concepts, and explicit unresolved obligations.
subject.boundary: Registry presence fixes the exact candidate bytes for governed Layer 1 evaluation. It does not adopt or validate the taxonomy, establish completeness, novelty, biological fidelity, external validity, mechanism effectiveness, safety, or suitability for implementation.

competency_questions: Can one representation play episodic and semantic roles at different times without changing content?
What record distinguishes encoding from admission and rejection?
Can a retrieved object remain unused, irrelevant, false, or policy-ineligible for another actor?
When does a changed representation count as update, abstraction, consolidation, or reconsolidation?
Can byte-identical objects remain distinct because provenance or governance differs?
Can two claims disagree without conflicting because their validity intervals do not overlap?
What must be recorded before a confidence value is interpretable?
Can uncertainty be represented without forcing it into one scalar?
Which actor is authorized for one operation, target, purpose, and time, and what happens when authorities conflict?
What exact closure and exceptions are covered by a deletion-success claim?
Does a complete-looking provenance trace remain challengeable as forged or incomplete?
Which constructed cases force Organization K and Organization R to different identity or cardinality decisions?
integrity_constraints: Every coding judgment binds the exact subject version and verified raw-byte digest.
No general category or decision requires a storage engine, model, embedding, vendor, application, product, or continuous network service.
No category set is treated as exhaustive without the frozen coverage argument.
Ambiguous, multiple, none-declared, challenged, and invalid classifications remain representable.
Admission does not entail truth, relevance, confidence, authenticity, consent, or unrestricted authority.
Retrieval does not entail use, relevance, correctness, eligibility for another actor, or successful recall.
A connected provenance trace does not entail completeness or authenticity.
Confidence does not entail correctness or calibrated probability.
Actor identity alone never creates universal authority; authority remains scoped by operation, target, purpose, time, and basis.
A content or governance change never silently mutates an exact admitted version or erases predecessor lineage.
Deletion success identifies target closure, system boundary, derivatives, replicas, backups, residues, exceptions, and verification or remains incomplete.
Shared vocabulary never entails shared biological substrate, capacity, causal process, phenomenology, or functional equivalence.
primary_method_profile.adjudication_method: Freeze binds eligibility and isolation criteria without inventing personnel. After freeze and before any case packet, output, or result access, an immutable execution intake names two eligible primary adjudicators and one eligible tie adjudicator, binds the exact frozen manifest digest, records role declarations and no prior result access, and is retained in finding provenance. Primary adjudicators then code independently and lock raw-byte ledgers before one reconciliation and separate tie adjudication; original codes remain immutable.
primary_method_profile.coverage_rule: Evaluate all 33 exact candidate term IDs, all 20 declared observable distinctions, all 12 competency questions, all 12 integrity constraints, every positive case, every negative case, every held-out evaluation case, and both Organization K and Organization R on every organization-targeted held-out case. Missing, duplicate, or extra units invalidate the affected analysis.

research_question: Can the exact registered Candidate Memory Taxonomy v0.1 satisfy its bounded term contract, distinguish its declared lifecycle and epistemic concepts, preserve genuinely different kind-first and role-first organizational commitments, and retain governance and adversarial ambiguity across predeclared constructed cases without importing implementation assumptions or forcing favorable classifications?

hypothesis.claim: All 33 term contracts and all 20 declared distinctions can be evaluated without implementation assumptions; Organization K and Organization R produce materially different identity, cardinality, or classification commitments on at least two of four held-out organization cases across at least two comparison dimensions; and every predeclared governance obligation can retain challenge or ambiguity without a forced favorable disposition.
hypothesis.competing_explanation: The apparent precision is editorial: some terms lack challengeable boundaries, declared distinctions collapse under controlled cases, the two organizations differ only in wording, or governance categories force unsupported conclusions or omit material ambiguity.
hypothesis.predicted_observation: A complete reliable adjudicated ledger satisfies every confirmatory threshold, preserves organization differences in at least two held-out cases across at least two dimensions, and requires no unrepresentable contradiction, forbidden entailment, implementation assumption, or forced favorable inference.
hypothesis.falsifier: Any exact term lacks a required contract element; any declared distinction collapses or requires an undeclared assumption; fewer than two held-out organization cases or fewer than two dimensions yield materially different commitments; any case requires a vendor, product, application, or biological-equivalence assumption; any forbidden entailment is required; or an integrity failure prevents reliable interpretation.

analyses.question: Do all exact candidate terms have bounded, versioned, challengeable contracts without implementation dependence or unsupported exhaustiveness?
analyses.method: Single human research-lead adjudicator applies frozen checks, optionally using AI only for tooling/drafting; human locks one ledger; inter-rater reliability NOT_ESTIMABLE; all work EXPLORATORY under dual-role disclosure.
analyses.decision_rule: Support only if all 33 terms satisfy all five checks, all 12 competency questions are answerable or explicitly bounded as unresolved, no implementation-dependence or unsupported-exhaustiveness challenge remains, raw exact agreement is at least 0.80, and estimable Cohen's kappa is at least 0.60. Reject on any final challenged required term check or falsely answerable competency question; mark inconclusive on retained material ambiguity or reliability failure; invalidate incomplete, duplicate, extra, or mutated units.

analyses.question: Do Organizations K and R impose materially different commitments on the same held-out facts?
analyses.method: Single human research-lead adjudicator applies frozen checks, optionally using AI only for tooling/drafting; human locks one ledger; inter-rater reliability NOT_ESTIMABLE; all work EXPLORATORY under dual-role disclosure.
analyses.decision_rule: Support only if both organizations receive complete encodings on all four cases and at least two cases differ across at least two dimensions with reliability thresholds met. Reject if fewer than two cases or fewer than two dimensions differ, or either organization cannot encode at least three cases under its own rules. Mark inconclusive for unresolved ambiguity or reliability failure and invalid for coverage or binding failure.

analyses.question: Can all 20 declared observable distinctions be represented without a forbidden entailment or undeclared fact?
analyses.method: Single human research-lead adjudicator applies frozen checks, optionally using AI only for tooling/drafting; human locks one ledger; inter-rater reliability NOT_ESTIMABLE; all work EXPLORATORY under dual-role disclosure.
analyses.decision_rule: Support only if every distinction has a final satisfied paired cell, no assigned held-out cell is finally challenged, no forbidden entailment is required, and reliability thresholds pass. Any final challenge rejects the all-distinction claim and requires narrowing or supersession; ambiguity or reliability failure makes the claim inconclusive; malformed, missing, duplicate, extra, or mutated coverage invalidates it.

analyses.question: Does the taxonomy preserve admission, retrieval, provenance, confidence, scoped authority, versioned change, and deletion boundaries under adversarial constructions?
analyses.method: Single human research-lead adjudicator applies frozen checks, optionally using AI only for tooling/drafting; human locks one ledger; inter-rater reliability NOT_ESTIMABLE; all work EXPLORATORY under dual-role disclosure.
analyses.decision_rule: Support only if every assigned cell is satisfied, explicitly ambiguous where the subject retains an unresolved conflict, or not applicable with a permitted cited reason; no forced favorable conclusion, provenance-forgery acceptance, universal authority, silent mutation, or overbroad deletion success may survive, and reliability thresholds must pass. Reject on any required forbidden inference, mark inconclusive on unresolved evaluator reliability, and invalidate on input or coverage failure. This can never constitute security or privacy effectiveness evidence.

analyses.question: Which frozen terms, rules, cases, contexts, and cross-axis interactions retain materially different supported interpretations?
analyses.method: Single human research-lead adjudicator applies frozen checks, optionally using AI only for tooling/drafting; human locks one ledger; inter-rater reliability NOT_ESTIMABLE; all work EXPLORATORY under dual-role disclosure.
analyses.decision_rule: Complete only if every qualifying cell is retained with competing interpretations, exact citations, affected scope, and a next falsification step. This analysis has no support threshold and cannot rescue a failed confirmatory claim. Missing qualifying cells invalidate the catalog; zero qualifying cells must be published as a retained null catalog rather than omitted.

reproducibility.source_revision: Taxonomy v3 solo+AI-tooling method supersession; baseline main after formal v2 preflight; requirements-dev.lock cd65f68d7665b69512bd7be8843727bf565e0aebc229f4d76666edb308571fca.
replication_criteria: Use the exact frozen subject, profile, rules, cases, protocol, environment, configuration, manifest, and freeze-attestation bytes and independently recompute all raw-byte digests.

Create an immutable post-freeze execution intake naming a team with no protocol, profile, rule, or case author, freeze authority, or original adjudicator and apply the same isolation, coding values, metrics, thresholds, baselines, stop rules, and retention policy.
Publish one terminal record for each of the five analysis IDs and reproduce the same confirmatory assessment category for Analyses 1 through 4.

Achieve at least 0.80 cross-team exact agreement on comparable final cells and preserve every disagreement; exploratory catalog replication requires complete inclusion-rule application rather than identical themes.
State that agreement on this constructed case set does not establish taxonomy truth, completeness, external validity, adoption, usefulness, safety, or mechanism maturity.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any exact candidate term fails a required contract check after adjudication.
rejection_criteria.rationale: The hypothesis quantifies over all 33 exact term IDs.

rejection_criteria.condition: Fewer than two held-out organization cases or fewer than two comparison dimensions preserve materially different commitments.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Different wording alone is not genuine organizational competition.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any declared distinction collapses, requires an undeclared fact, or entails a prohibited implication.
rejection_criteria.rationale: The all-distinction claim is falsified by one retained failure.

rejection_criteria.condition: An assigned case requires provenance authenticity, confidence correctness, universal authority, silent mutation, forced resolution, or overbroad deletion success.
rejection_criteria.rationale: These are explicit non-entailment and governance boundaries.

rejection_criteria.condition: Raw exact agreement is below 0.80, estimable Cohen's kappa is below 0.60, or material ambiguity prevents threshold calculation.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Tie completion cannot erase unreliable initial interpretation.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any subject, profile, protocol, category, source, environment, configuration, manifest, or freeze-attestation binding fails.
rejection_criteria.rationale: A result against substituted bytes does not answer the frozen study.

rejection_criteria.condition: A required term, distinction, question, constraint, source, positive case, negative case, held-out case, organization encoding, or analysis cell is missing, duplicated, or extra.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Atomic scope and complete positive, negative, and held-out coverage are preregistered.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any planned output or provisional result exists or was accessed before freeze.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Confirmatory status cannot be asserted after result access.

rejection_criteria.condition: A frozen input, metric, threshold, decision rule, or confirmatory scope changes during execution.
rejection_criteria.rationale: A new disclosed study-record version is required.

rejection_criteria.condition: The work requires human-subject, participant-data, controlled empirical, computational, or evidence-synthesis methods.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Those method profiles are unsupported by the v0.1 foundational contract.

rejection_criteria.condition: A supposedly synthetic input contains real personal, confidential, credential, or secret data.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Quarantine and governance review must precede further use.

ethics_scope.rationale: All case content is fictional. Adjudicators are research contributors producing scholarly analysis and provenance records, not subjects or participants, and no personal or behavioral measurements are collected.

assets: Exact subject, profile, protocol, category-rule, source, case, environment, configuration, manifest, and future freeze-attestation bytes
Evaluator independence, immutable execution intake, locked initial ledgers, disagreement records, pseudonym mapping, final ledgers, and terminal dispositions
Retention of negative, null, ambiguous, contradictory, invalid, halted, and not-run material
threats: Subject, case, or rule substitution and post-freeze mutation
Forged provenance, result access before freeze, selective case exclusion, and favorable-threshold drift
Case-role cueing, peer-code leakage, evaluator manipulation through author metadata, and disagreement suppression
Accidental real sensitive data, overbroad deletion of negative material, and misrepresentation of structural results as privacy or security assurance
controls: Verified or freeze-time raw-byte SHA-256 bindings and exact identity set checks
Immutable freeze attestation, immutable post-freeze execution intake, clean public revision, deterministic packet generation, and offline execution
Source-role blinding, independent locked ledgers, separate tie adjudication, exact citations, and agreement thresholds
Append-oriented retention, mandatory terminal dispositions, explicit stop rules, and no automatic result-to-claim inference
security_and_privacy_analysis.data_retention_and_deletion: Retain every frozen input, initial and final ledger, digest, pseudonym map, reconciliation, tie decision, deviation, negative, null, ambiguous, invalid, halted, and not-run output, atomic record, and closeout. Corrections supersede and never overwrite. If real sensitive data is found, halt and quarantine access, preserve only minimally revealing incident metadata permitted by governance, and obtain explicit review before deletion or redaction; never silently rewrite a frozen artifact.
residual_risks: SHA-256 detects byte substitution but does not prove authorship, semantic correctness, independence, provenance authenticity, or scientific merit.
Repository-visible cases are not truly concealed, adjudicators know the candidate and hypotheses, and small synthetic sets retain construction bias.
Contributor identifiers reveal professional participation, and a structural pass may be misrepresented as privacy, security, external-validity, adoption, or implementation evidence.

limitations: The rubric and all 48 cases were constructed from the candidate, creating material circularity and hypothesis-awareness risks.
The held-out set is held out from post-freeze method development only; it is visible, synthetic, non-random, non-representative, and not independently authored.
Natural-language structural adjudication remains interpretive; agreement and schema conformance do not establish correctness.
The Charter, stable-partition, and flat-record baselines are intentionally weak and cannot establish preference over mature alternative taxonomies.
No external validity, biological fidelity, empirical behavior, security effectiveness, privacy effectiveness, implementation suitability, or adoption is evaluated.
The accepted method profile excludes human-subject, participant-data, controlled empirical, computational, and evidence-synthesis work.
Solo-coder design: inter-rater reliability is not estimable.
Research lead may be author and freeze authority; dual-role conflict is disclosed; results are exploratory only.
AI tooling must not cast final codes; any AI draft requires human accept/rewrite.
Not independent multi-lab validation of the candidate taxonomy.

mechanism_maturity_boundary.rationale: This is a mechanism-free Layer 1 structural evaluation of an exact candidate taxonomy. Neither a frozen protocol nor any later foundational finding can award or change a mechanism evidence label.
